name: Similarweb

auth.notes: API keys are generated by account admins, must be activated, and are tied to account permissions plus user credit allowances.

pagination: limit, offset, sort, asc on many aggregated endpoints.
notes: Official REST and Batch API docs cover authentication, credits/capabilities, rate limits, V4 pagination parameters, and V5 support/FAQ.
Official Similarweb MCP pages and knowledge-center docs now link to an MCP setup guide and describe account-connected LLM/agent access; access and query limits depend on subscription.
